text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
There's a certain ineffable sense to<n>her
movements... As expected of a<n>student in the thick
of her career.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time to think up a new event!<n>We need to
put her strengths on full<n>display!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello seems to be inspired after<n>watching
<chrname> train.
